title: Financial PhraseBank - Sentiment Classification
description: Sentiment classification of financial news sentences based on the Financial PhraseBank dataset (Malo et al., JASIST 2014). Annotators classify sentences from financial news articles into fine-grained and coarse sentiment categories.
citation:
@article{malo2014good,
    title = "Good debt or bad debt: Detecting semantic orientations in economic texts",
    author = "Malo, Pekka and Sinha, Ankur and Korhonen, Pekka and Wallenius, Jyrki and Takala, Pyry",
    journal = "Journal of the Association for Information Science and Technology",
    volume = "65",
    number = "4",
    pages = "782--796",
    year = "2014",
    url = "https://arxiv.org/abs/1307.5336"
}
